summary: Mutation testing results: 49 killed, 11 survived, 1 no coverage. Mutation score: 80.33%.
testQuality: The test suite is broadly solid — 49 of 61 mutants killed — but three related areas are under-constrained. The isStoredCredentials type guard has 9 survivors because tests never distinguish individual guard conditions (non-object values, fields with wrong types, partial field presence). Two encoding-argument mutants survive on writeFileSync and readFileSync because the tests never assert the third argument.

suggestions.description: Mutants survived on hasStringProp: logical operator || and conditional true both survive, meaning tests never distinguish key-present-but-wrong-type from key-absent.
suggestions.rationale: The missing-fields test only checks { token: abc } (missing email and expiresAt). No test passes an object where a field is present but has a non-string value (e.g. { token: 123, email: true, expiresAt: null }), so the typeof check in hasStringProp is untested.
suggestions.suggestion: Add: loadCredentials returns null when required fields are present but not strings. Mock readFileSync to return JSON.stringify({ token: 123, email: true, expiresAt: null }) and expect result to be null.

suggestions.description: Multiple mutants survived on the isStoredCredentials null/object guard: typeof check can be replaced with false, and value === null arm can be short-circuited.
suggestions.rationale: No test passes a non-null non-object primitive (number, string, boolean, array) as parsed JSON, so the object/null guard is never exercised in isolation.
suggestions.suggestion: Add: loadCredentials returns null when parsed JSON is a primitive (mock readFileSync to return '42' or '"hello"'). Add: loadCredentials returns null when parsed JSON is an array (mock readFileSync to return '[]').

suggestions.description: LogicalOperator and ConditionalExpression mutants survived on the three-way && chain in isStoredCredentials, including replacing hasStringProp(value, token) && hasStringProp(value, email) with true.
suggestions.rationale: There is no test that passes an object with exactly two of the three required fields, so the individual && conjuncts are indistinguishable.
suggestions.suggestion: Add tests: loadCredentials returns null when only token and email are present (missing expiresAt), loadCredentials returns null when only email and expiresAt are present (missing token).

suggestions.description: StringLiteral mutant survived: utf-8 encoding argument to writeFileSync mutated to empty string and tests still pass.
suggestions.rationale: The writeFileSync test only asserts the file path and JSON content; it does not assert the encoding argument.
suggestions.suggestion: Update the writes credentials test to assert the third argument: expect(vi.mocked(fs.writeFileSync).mock.calls[0]\![2]).toBe('utf-8').

suggestions.description: StringLiteral mutant survived: utf-8 encoding argument to readFileSync mutated to empty string and tests still pass.
suggestions.rationale: No test asserts how readFileSync is called — only its return value is mocked.
suggestions.suggestion: Add assertion: expect(fs.readFileSync).toHaveBeenCalledWith(CREDENTIALS_PATH, 'utf-8') in the loadCredentials happy-path test.
